    "ConsistsOf": [

      "それは2025年3月現在、201万人以上のチャンネル登録者を持っています。",

      "それはスタジオアルバムを含むディスコグラフィーを持っています。"
    ],

      "それは「VideoSongs」と呼ばれる、2つのルールで定義されたメディアを特徴としています。",

      "それは2010年のクリスマスシーズンにヒュンダイの広告でYouTube動画のスタイルで演奏したことを特徴としています。"

About: It is about a musical husband-and-wife duo.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with viral YouTube videos.
It is associated with covers of popular songs.
ComposedBy: It was composed by multi-instrumentalist Jack Conte and singer-songwriter and bassist Nataly Dawn.
ConsistsOf: It consists of multi-instrumentalist Jack Conte and singer-songwriter and bassist Nataly Dawn.
CreatedBy: It was created by Jack Conte and Nataly Dawn.
HasA: It has about 100,000 songs sold online in 2009.
It has more than 2.01 million subscribers as of March 2025.
It has over 640 million views on their YouTube channel as of March 2025.
It has a webcast named Hey, It's Pomplamoose: A Show about Pomplamoose and Other Things.
It has a three-part sequel to the band's early years.
It has a book drive for a charter school in Richmond, California.
It has a discography including studio albums.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by "VideoSongs", a medium defined with two rules.
It is characterized by "glitz-free" manner in which they record.
It is characterized by performing in several ads in the style of their YouTube videos for Hyundai during the Christmas season of 2010.
HeldIn: It was held in Seattle's Benaroya Hall.
IsA: It is an American musical husband-and-wife duo.
KnownFor: It is known for their viral YouTube videos.
It is known for covers of popular songs.
OccurredAt: It occurred at Seattle's Benaroya Hall.
It occurred at a charter school in Richmond, California.
OccurredDuring: It occurred during the Christmas season of 2010.
PartOf: It is part of a husband-and-wife duo.
PerformedBy: It was performed by Jack Conte.
It was performed by Nataly Dawn.
PublishedAs: It was published as a single.
UsedAs: It is used as a medium called "VideoSongs".
UsedFor: It is used for commercials for Toyota's Avalon series.
It is used for ads for Hyundai.
It is used for a book drive.
UsedIn: It is used in a commercial for Toyota's Avalon series.
It is used in ads for Hyundai.
It is used in a book drive.
UsedTo: It is used to sell about 100,000 songs online in 2009.
It is used to release fewer videos per month due to Nataly Dawn's condition.
